mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bid_list_view WHERE auction_idx = #{auctionIdx} AND bid_status_idx IN (1, 2, 3) ORDER BY bid_price ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE bid SET bid_status_idx = 4, bid_moddate = NOW() WHERE bid_idx = #{bidIdx} AND bidder_idx = #{bidderIdx} AND bid_status_idx = 1 AND auction_idx IN ( SELECT a.auction_idx FROM auction a WHERE a.auction_idx = bid.auction_idx AND a.auction_status_idx = 1 AND a.auction_end_at > NOW() AND a.auction_is_deleted = 'N' )
UPDATE bid SET bid_status_idx = 5, bid_moddate = NOW() WHERE bid_idx = #{bidIdx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item ( item_name, item_category_idx, item_brand, item_thumbnail_img, item_condition, item_regdate, item_is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{itemName}, #{itemCategoryIdx}, #{itemBrand}, #{itemThumbnailImg}, 'NEW', NOW(), 'N' )

INSERT INTO bid ( auction_idx, bidder_idx, item_idx, bid_price, bid_quantity, bid_message, bid_status_idx, bid_regdate ) SELECT #{auctionIdx}, #{bidderIdx}, #{itemIdx}, #{bidPrice}, #{bidQuantity}, #{bidMessage}, 1, NOW() FROM auction a WHERE a.auction_idx = #{auctionIdx} AND a.auction_status_idx = 1 AND a.auction_end_at > NOW() AND a.auction_is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT bidder_idx FROM bid WHERE auction_idx = #{auctionIdx} AND bid_status_idx IN (1, 2, 3)
mapper.update: UPDATE bid SET bid_status_idx = 4, bid_moddate = NOW() WHERE auction_idx = #{auctionIdx} AND bid_status_idx = 1
